stemHtml:
Regarding various types of switches used to control aircraft electrical systems, select the three correct statements...

1. Rocker switches can operate on one circuit, switching it on or off, depending on its position.
2. Rotary switches perform the function of 4 guarded switches.
3. Toggle switches, when pulled upwards and towards the pilot, will be in the ‘on’ position.
4. Toggle switches can operate on one circuit, switching it on or off, depending on its position.
5. Push switches are sprung and can be used to active or de-activate one circuit.
